text: Sector Growth: Agriculture. FY24 growth: 1.4%. Contribution to GDP: 15%. Employs ~42% of workforce. Affected by El Nino. Kharif production impacted. Rabi season recovery. Government pushed PM-KISAN and crop insurance.

Sector Growth: Manufacturing. FY24 growth: 9.9%. Contribution to GDP: 17.4%. Driven by PLI schemes, auto sector boom, electronics manufacturing. India became 5th largest manufacturing nation. ₹1.97 lakh crore PLI incentives.

Sector Growth: Services. FY24 growth: 7.6%. Contribution to GDP: 54%. Includes IT/BPO, finance, real estate, trade. India's largest GDP contributor. IT exports: $200 billion+. Financial services grew 7.1%.

Sector Growth: Construction. FY24 growth: 10.7%. Contribution to GDP: 8.5%. Driven by national highway expansion, housing (PMAY), and infrastructure push. PM GatiShakti Master Plan coordination. Employs 7.1 crore workers.

Sector Growth: Mining & Quarrying. FY24 growth: 7.1%. Contribution to GDP: 2.4%. Coal production reached 1 billion tonnes target. Iron ore, limestone, bauxite production up. Mining reforms through MMDR Amendment Act.

Sector Growth: IT & Digital Economy. FY24 growth: 8.3%. Contribution to GDP: 7.5%. Revenue: $254 billion. Exports: $200 billion. 5.4 million direct employees. AI and cloud services driving growth. India stack powering digital infrastructure.

Sector Growth: Defence Manufacturing. FY24 growth: 12%. Defence exports reached ₹21,083 crore. Goal: $5 billion exports by 2025. 411 items on positive indigenization list. Private sector participation increased under strategic partnership model.

Sector Growth: Renewable Energy. FY24 growth: 15%. Installed capacity: 190 GW (including large hydro). Solar: 82 GW. Wind: 47 GW. Target: 500 GW non-fossil fuel by 2030. Green hydrogen mission. India 4th globally in renewables.
